trivia_bullets.text: Burn Bright originated in Ravnica Allegiance (January 2019), where it served as a Gruul combat-trick instant. The Gruul Clans are Ravnica's displaced wilderness faction — nomadic tribes who lost their territory to urban sprawl and channel that displacement into ritual fire and battle-rage. [Scryfall: set=rna, type_line=Instant]

The card has been reprinted five times across: Ravnica Allegiance (2019), Core Set 2021 (2020), Arena Beginner Set (2020), Jumpstart 2022 (2022), and Ravnica Remastered (2024) — all five printings carry the same Scott Murphy art. [Scryfall: prints_search_uri]

"From a great bonfire at the dawn of time, the first Gruul kindled their rage. The same flame burns in you." — Kroshkar, Gruul shaman. [Scryfall] The speaker, Kroshkar, is a named Gruul shaman voice used to frame Gruul origin mythology; this is their only credited flavor text appearance across all Scryfall-indexed cards.

EDHREC rank 15,805 [Scryfall field: edhrec_rank]. The card is legal in Pauper, Pioneer, Modern, Legacy, Vintage, and Commander. As a {2}{R} pump instant it sees niche use in Pauper red-aggro and Gruul stompy commander lists as a mid-combat surprise, but is not considered a format staple.

related_cards.name: Reckless Bushwhacker
related_cards.note: Same role: red combat-pump instant for token-wide offense; frequent Pauper comparison point

related_cards.name: Titanic Ultimatum
related_cards.note: Gruul-adjacent mass pump instant; thematic predecessor for mass combat buffs

related_cards.name: Krenko, Mob Boss
related_cards.note: Represents the opposing red-aggro axis (Goblins vs. Gruul) that Burn Bright supports in Pauper
